parents.subject: LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror

commit.subject: LU-20100 obdclass: max_cached_mb module parameter
commit.message:
LU-20100 obdclass: max_cached_mb module parameter

Add module parameter to lustre to allow default setting of
max_cached_mb

Use max_cached_mb to set the initial for
  lctl set_param llite.*.max_cached_mb=<MB>

Ex: /etc/modprobe.d/lustre.conf contains:
options lustre max_cached_mb=6173

HPE-bug-id: LUS-13233
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I0639fc7eec8d100adee0ffba97dc2f1c843dad63
